'''yazhunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scaleability|scaleability]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scaleability|scaleability]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yazhunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzhinith|yæzhinith]] || [[word:yæzhinij|yæzhinij]] || [[word:yæzhinish|yæzhinish]] || [[word:yæzhini|yæzhini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhuzhunuth|yazhuzhunuth]] || [[word:yazhuzhunuj|yazhuzhunuj]] || [[word:yazhuzhunush|yazhuzhunush]] || [[word:yazhuzhunu|yazhuzhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhunuth|yazhunuth]] || [[word:yazhunuj|yazhunuj]] || [[word:yazhunush|yazhunush]] || [[word:yazhunu|yazhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhufnuth|yazhufnuth]] || [[word:yazhufnuj|yazhufnuj]] || [[word:yazhufnush|yazhufnush]] || [[word:yazhufnuf|yazhufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazhunuthu|yazhunuthu]] || [[word:yazhunuju|yazhunuju]] || [[word:yazhunushu|yazhunushu]] || [[word:yazhunuku|yazhunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazhunuth|yazhunuth]] || [[word:yazhunuj|yazhunuj]] || [[word:yazhunush|yazhunush]] || [[word:yazhunu|yazhunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazhunuthul|yazhunuthul]] || [[word:yazhunujul|yazhunujul]] || [[word:yazhunushul|yazhunushul]] || [[word:yazhunukul|yazhunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazhunuthuthu|yazhunuthuthu]] || [[word:yazhunujuju|yazhunujuju]] || [[word:yazhunushushu|yazhunushushu]] || [[word:yazhunuku|yazhunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazhunuthun|yazhunuthun]] || [[word:yazhunujun|yazhunujun]] || [[word:yazhunushun|yazhunushun]] || [[word:yazhunukun|yazhunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazhunuthuoro|yazhunuthuoro]] || [[word:yazhunujuoro|yazhunujuoro]] || [[word:yazhunushuoro|yazhunushuoro]] || [[word:yazhunukuoro|yazhunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
